idleDefault.description: Default auto-snooze idle threshold, in seconds (full build).

socialEnabled.description: Force the screen-time timer on/off (full build).

socialDomains.description: Preset list of sites the screen-time timer counts (full build).

safeHoldEngageStartup.description: Engage Safe-Hold automatically at startup (full build).

requireVpn.description: Require manual VPN confirmation before traffic resumes (full build).

holdPrevSession.description: Hold previous-session tabs until reviewed (full build).

shStartup.description: Lite/HiberSpace: engage Safe-Hold automatically at startup.

shRequireVpn.description: Lite/HiberSpace: require manual VPN confirmation before resume.

lockSettings.description: If true, users cannot change any admin-set value (controls are shown but disabled).

securityReportingEndpoint.description: OPTIONAL https URL to POST security alerts to. Off unless set AND the reporting-enabled manifest (whose CSP/host_permissions allow this endpoint) is deployed. Leave empty for local export only.
